title: Crowbar Jones 2: Another Reckoning
description: In 2034, Beartropolis is consumed by crime. Only one bear has the power to bring order to chaos.
quote: Wait a second. The President would never give out his Ferrari Turbo to anyone!
altHero: Grizz as Crowbar Jones, a bear with bowtie and grey hair
alt2: Mr. President, a penguin with a platinum album and a gold medal
alt3: a bear sits at the computer and another bear paces the room, it’s obviously been split screen composited as one bear is partially cut off
alt4: Crowbar Jones wearing a scuba suit and jet pack flying in front of handmade, cardboard clouds
